prompt:
There is an opinion that young people should go to work after school. I cannnot agree with this point. Let me explain.

Of course, going to work early sounds good. A person begins to gain work experience, builds a career and earns money for himself. This is a good opportunity for people who are confident in themselves and have decided on the field in which they want to work.

But there is different situation. School graduates often don't know what they want to do and where they want to work. Or maybe they want to work in science or in other difficult area. In this situation university is the best choice. In the university people study different complex subjects. They can try various fields and choose what they like. And knowledge that university gives is complex.

To sum it up, there is no one right answer to this question.The choice depends on the situation and needs of a particular person.

TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Explain two advantages of the internet for students.
STUDENT_TEXT: On the one hand, internet is good. We can decide many problems online. Im happy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Describe a plan that changed and explain the final outcome.
STUDENT_TEXT: Ideally, we should have go to the park, but it was raining. Nevertheless, the atmosphere was overload with joy.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
TEXTINSPECTOR_LEVEL: B1+

TASK: Give practical time-management advice to classmates.
STUDENT_TEXT: You should organise your week. Write down all deadlines and allocate time for tasks per day. To sum up, set priorities and keep in mind that everyone got same time. It appears that procrastination undermines productivity.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
FLESCH_KINCAID: 10.4

TASK: Discuss whether authorities underestimate a social crisis.
STUDENT_TEXT: It appears that the government tends to underestimate the severity of the crisis. Seldom have we seen such negligence. This may indicate a systemic failure.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: Write a persuasive formal paragraph on environmental responsibility.
STUDENT_TEXT: We must not ignore the environmental issues lest we face irreversible consequences. Is it not our duty to preserve the planet? We observe a stark contrast: technological triumph vs moral decay.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

TASK: There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.
STUDENT_TEXT: There is an opinion that young people should go to work after school. I cannnot agree with this point. Let me explain.

Of course, going to work early sounds good. A person begins to gain work experience, builds a career and earns money for himself. This is a good opportunity for people who are confident in themselves and have decided on the field in which they want to work.

But there is different situation. School graduates often don't know what they want to do and where they want to work. Or maybe they want to work in science or in other difficult area. In this situation university is the best choice. In the university people study different complex subjects. They can try various fields and choose what they like. And knowledge that university gives is complex.

To sum it up, there is no one right answer to this question.The choice depends on the situation and needs of a particular person.
TEXT_TYPE: essay
